{{Infobox location
| name = Visiria
| introduced = The Captain
}}

''See also: [[Visiria Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Visiria refers to both a species and a planetary system within the [[Karoshan Alliance]]. The [[Visiri]] people are characterized by their superhuman physical capabilities, such as the ability to damage starship plating with their hands, and a natural talent for Aetheric [[Combat Arts]]. Physically, they often possess three eyes and red skin, though variations exist, including individuals with white hair or pale pink tones. They have the unique ability to perceive [[life]] energy, though they generally possess a weaker connection to the [[Aether]] than other intelligent species. While many [[Visiri]] are described as genial warriors who dislike following orders, their home planet serves as a major power and the primary secondary member of the [[Karoshan Alliance]]. The planet Visiria is a blue and green world with brown-looking continents due to its climate and history of warfare. It features diverse landscapes, including lush floating islands of jungle and oceanic plants. The planet is governed by [[Nelula Seiren]] and possesses a powerful [[World Spirit]] that can manifest physically, often exhibiting intense fury. The [[Visiria system]] has recently faced significant conflict, including an invasion by the [[D’Niss]] and encounters with insect swarms. While the planet remains outside of [[Galactic Union]] control, it maintains access to the [[Union Subline]]. Public opinion regarding the entity known as [[The Last Horizon]] is split on Visiria; some residents view them as heroes who defended the system, while others perceive them as unstable and dangerous.}}

== The Captain ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Visiria]] is a place where [[Varic]] was a prize fighter.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14">''The Captain'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Visiria]] is a continent in the southeastern part of the world.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c22">''The Captain'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Visiria]] is a likely destination for an intervention.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c42">''The Captain'', chapter 42</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Visiria is a blue planet and a major component of the [[Karoshan Alliance]] that remains largely independent from the [[Empire]]. The world is home to the [[Prime Coliseum]] and a unique jungle composed of floating islands of plant [[life]]. Although its navy is not notable on a galactic scale, the planet contains many ships and serves as a major system that the [[Swarm-Queen]] might feed on. While forming an alliance with Visiria is a strategic goal and the [[Titan Knight]] is believed to be located there, a group of [[Perfected]] moved toward the planet. Ultimately, despite [[Raion]] working on the world, the people of Visiria suffered a loss.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">17</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Visiria]] is the location of the [[Prime Coliseum]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c1">''The Knight'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Visiria]] is part of the [[Karoshan Alliance]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Visiria]] is a planet that is one of the major components of the [[Karoshan Alliance]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c13">''The Knight'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Visiria]] is largely independent from the [[Empire]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Visiria]] is a planet containing a jungle made of floating islands of plants.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c14">''The Knight'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The Visirian navy is not notable on a galactic scale.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The narrator does not want to fight [[Visiria]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c15">''The Knight'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Visiria]] is a location/faction that could potentially be brought to the side of the protagonists.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c17">''The Knight'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|A potential alliance with [[Visiria]] is a goal.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c19">''The Knight'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Titan Knight]] is supposed to be on [[Visiria]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c21">''The Knight'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Raion]] is working on the planet [[Visiria]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c24">''The Knight'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Visiria]] is a planet.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c25">''The Knight'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Visiria]] is a major system that the [[Swarm-Queen]] might feed on.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c34">''The Knight'', chapter 34</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|A group of [[Perfected]] moved for [[Visiria]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c36">''The Knight'', chapter 36</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Visiria]] is a planet with many ships.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c37">''The Knight'', chapter 37</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The people of [[Visiria]] lost.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c38">''The Knight'', chapter 38</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Visiria]] is a blue planet.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c40">''The Knight'', chapter 40</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Visiria is a significant planet located within the [[Visiria system]], which maintains populations across every world in its territory. Governed by [[Nelula Seiren]], the planet sits outside of [[Galactic Union]] control despite having access to the [[Union Subline]]. Several weeks prior to recent events, the world suffered an attack by the [[Zenith]] Starship. In the aftermath of this assault, the [[Vallenar Corporation]] has begun taking stock of its assets on the planet.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Visiria]] is a location in the [[Visiria system]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c1">''The Pilot'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Visiria]] is a planet that was attacked by the [[Zenith]] Starship.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c2">''The Pilot'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Visiria]] is an important world with populations on every planet in its system.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c10">''The Pilot'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Vallenar Corporation]] is taking stock of assets on [[Visiria]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c18">''The Pilot'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Zenith Starship]] attacked [[Visiria]] weeks prior.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c26">''The Pilot'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Visiria]] is a planet governed by [[Nelula Seiren]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c27">''The Pilot'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Visiria]] is a location outside of [[Galactic Union]] control that has access to the [[Union Subline]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c34">''The Pilot'', chapter 34</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“If we can get Visiria on our side, or at least keep them from getting in our way, we’ll have an easier time fighting the D’Niss.”<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c17" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“The ones who lost,” I said, “are the people of Visiria.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c38" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“I’m looking at a Subline report that says he’s flying around the Visiria system in a Zenith Device. Is that true, Jak?”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c1" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“Only weeks after their attack on Visiria, The Last Horizon puts a target lock on the Galaxy’s Capital…”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c26" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
